name: Document links
description: Reads each newly readable document, finds mentions of people already in your vault, and asserts anchored core.link references — the exact quoted passage, machine-attributed, endable any time.
prompt: When documents become readable, find where they mention people I already know. Link each document to the mentioned person with the exact quoted passage as the anchor. Only link people who already exist in my vault — never invent contacts — and never re-assert a link that's already live.

vault.why: Reads newly readable documents' text and the party list, and asserts anchored references (core.link_entities, both endpoints already readable) from documents to the people they mention (issue #299 phase 4).
